title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Franky, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Franky, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Is to have their shadows taken!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Look, they would just be like me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And won't wake for two days.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: ...do you know the reason for that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why not kill them while they're unconscious?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I see... that is very logical.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This is the zombies' weak point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, if you say it like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: the "shadow" that he had inside him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: for them to have such a weakness...

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Franky, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.
